message:
🌱 cloudevents: Event keys (#1907)

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: Event keys mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: Event keys mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cloudevents event-keys mission: remove closed PR, fix resolution

- Remove closed PR #191 (unmerged ordinal proposal) from sourceUrls
- Replace resolution describing unmerged ordinal proposal with accurate
  description of sequence/partitioning extension attributes in CloudEvents v1.0
- Update steps to show sequence and partitionkey extension usage

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cloudevents-209-event-keys",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cloudevents: Event keys",
+    "description": "Event keys. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cloudevents setup",
+        "description": "Verify your cloudevents version:\nCloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)\nThis feature requires cloudevents as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cloudevents configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:\nEvent streams often have an ordering which is important for a set of events for the same entity, but not for events of different entities."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use CloudEvents extension attributes for event ordering",
+        "description": "CloudEvents v1.0 addresses event ordering through extension attributes rather than a core 'ordinal' field. Use the `sequence` extension attribute to indicate event order, and the Partitioning extension for key-based routing:\n```json\n{\n  \"specversion\": \"1.0\",\n  \"type\": \"com.example.user.created\",\n  \"source\": \"/users\",\n  \"id\": \"A234-1234-1234\",\n  \"sequence\": \"1\",\n  \"sequencetype\": \"Integer\",\n  \"partitionkey\": \"user-alice\",\n  \"data\": { \"name\": \"alice\" }\n}\n```\nThe `sequence` extension provides explicit ordering per source, while `partitionkey` enables consumers and intermediaries to route related events to the same processing partition. See the CloudEvents Extensions catalog for details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Event keys\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The event ordering/key concept was addressed as part of the CloudEvents v1.0 specification work. Rather than adding an explicit 'ordinal' field, the spec recommends using extension attributes (like 'sequence') for ordering when needed. The Partitioning extension provides guidance for event routing based on keys.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cloudevents",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/issues/209",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "description": "CloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:29:56.400Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
